mapper.select: SELECT WRITE_YEAR, DOC_TYPE, DOC_NO, COMP_ID, CAR_TYPE, TITLE, CTRL_ORGN_ID, CTRL_ORGN_NM, ACTION_ORGN_ID, ACTION_ORGN_NM, WRITE_DT, RETURN_DT, ACTION_REQUEST_CONTENT, ANALYTIC_PREVENT_CONTENT, RESULT_VALIDATION_CONTENT, RESULT_VALIDATION_YN, CHECK_DT, USE_YN, CREATED_AT, CREATED_BY, UPDATED_AT, UPDATED_BY FROM ESG.TB_CORRECTIVE_ACTION_REQUEST TEI WHERE 1=1 AND WRITE_YEAR = #{writeYear} AND DOC_NO = #{docNo} AND CAR_TYPE = 'E'
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO esg.tb_corrective_action_request( WRITE_YEAR, DOC_TYPE, DOC_NO, COMP_ID, CAR_TYPE, TITLE, CTRL_ORGN_ID, CTRL_ORGN_NM, ACTION_ORGN_ID, ACTION_ORGN_NM, WRITE_DT, RETURN_DT, ACTION_REQUEST_CONTENT, ANALYTIC_PREVENT_CONTENT, RESULT_VALIDATION_CONTENT, RESULT_VALIDATION_YN, CHECK_DT, USE_YN, CREATED_AT, CREATED_BY, UPDATED_AT, UPDATED_BY ) VALUES( #{writeYear}, 'CAR', (SELECT LPAD((COUNT(*) +1)::text, 5, '0') FROM ESG.TB_CORRECTIVE_ACTION_REQUEST CAR WHERE CAR.WRITE_YEAR = #{writeYear}), #{compId}, 'E', #{title}, #{ctrlOrgnId}, #{ctrlOrgnNm}, #{actionOrgnId}, #{actionOrgnNm}, #{writeDt}, #{returnDt}, #{actionRequestContent}, #{analyticPreventContent}, #{resultValidationContent}, #{resultValidationYn}, #{checkDt}, 'Y', NOW(), #{createdBy}, NOW(), #{updatedBy} );
SELECT MAX(DOC_NO) DOC_NO FROM ESG.TB_CORRECTIVE_ACTION_REQUEST WHERE 1=1 AND WRITE_YEAR = #{writeYear} AND DOC_TYPE = 'CAR' AND CAR_TYPE = 'E'
mapper.update: UPDATE ESG.TB_CORRECTIVE_ACTION_REQUEST SET COMP_ID =#{compId}, TITLE =#{title}, CTRL_ORGN_ID =#{ctrlOrgnId}, CTRL_ORGN_NM =#{ctrlOrgnNm}, ACTION_ORGN_ID =#{actionOrgnId}, ACTION_ORGN_NM =#{actionOrgnNm}, WRITE_DT =#{writeDt}, RETURN_DT =#{returnDt}, ACTION_REQUEST_CONTENT =#{actionRequestContent}, ANALYTIC_PREVENT_CONTENT =#{analyticPreventContent}, RESULT_VALIDATION_CONTENT =#{resultValidationContent}, RESULT_VALIDATION_YN =#{resultValidationYn}, CHECK_DT =#{checkDt}, USE_YN =#{useYn}, UPDATED_AT =NOW(), UPDATED_BY =#{updatedBy} WHERE 1=1 AND WRITE_YEAR =#{writeYear} AND DOC_NO =#{docNo} AND CAR_TYPE ='E'
mapper.select: select t1.* , t2.orgn_nm as searchText2 from esg.tb_corrective_action_request t1 left join esg.tb_orgn_info t2 on t1.comp_id = t2.comp_id and t1.ctrl_orgn_id = t2.orgn_id where t1.write_year = #{writeYear} and t1.comp_id = #{compId} and t1.use_yn = 'Y' and t1.car_type = 'E' and t1.ctrl_orgn_id = #{searchText}
